dialogos.texto_en: Hey, both of you are here.
Fu-kun? You're alone?
You're not with Yotsuba.
Well, actually, I wanted to ask you guys something.
Huh? Did something happen?
It's not anything like that.\nDo you two have anything you want to do after this?\nSightseeing, shopping, anything is cool.
Huh? Even if we told you what we want to do...\nYotsuba should have made a plan for us, right?
Well, that Yotsuba's said\nshe wanted to hear everyone's thoughts.
*sigh*\nThere she goes again...\nbut I guess there's no helping it.
People's personalities don't change that easily.\nBesides, Yotsuba is always enthusiastic\nabout taking charge in situations like this.
Well, that's just how Yotsuba thinks.
So, do you guys have any thoughts?
Then, why not do something that Yotsuba likes?
She was really looking forward to this graduation trip\nand seemed to have researched a lot about Okinawa.
That so?
Yeah, she bought a lot of guidebooks\nand did some research on the internet.
The guidebooks were full of sticky notes.\nThey were so covered in them that they\nlost all meaning.
Oh, so she planned everything thoroughly.
So, pretty much,\nthe two of you don't have any specific requests?
I don't mind.\nI've already entrusted everything to Yotsuba.
If we decide too hastily and the facilities are closed\nor we need reservations,\nit'll just be a waste of time, right?
Oh, I see. I'll let her know.
Ah...
Yotsuba made the plan for this trip?
Yes, mostly Yotsuba did.\nWe also gave our thoughts though.
She started researching\nright after we decided to go on this trip.
I wanted to help her, but she said\nto leave it to her and ran about,\nnotebook in hand.
I was worried that she might get tired\nbefore the trip even started.
She really tried her best, eh.
Yotsuba's normally the type to work really hard,\nbut this is a special trip for her, because\nit's her first trip with her new boyfriend.
I-I see...
S-so, pretty much,\nthe two of you don't have any specific requests?
I don't mind.\nI've already entrusted everything to Yotsuba.
If we decide too hastily and the facilities are closed\nor we need reservations,\nit'll just be a waste of time, right?
Oh, I see. I'll let her know.
Ah...
I understand how she feels!\nMaking a solid plan is so much fun!
You would feel the same way, wouldn't you, Futaro?
But if the plan is too rigid,\nit might be difficult\nto handle unexpected situations on-site.
Yotsuba seems to be okay with that.\nShe's even considered alternative plans\nin case of bad weather.
Wow, she knows what she's doing.
That's just how pumped up she is.\nThis vacation is really special to her.
That's right.\nIt IS our graduation trip,\nwe can only have one.
That's true%p-2;――
But also, it's your first trip together\nas a couple. It's special for that reason, too.
Ah...\nTh-that's right...
S-so, pretty much,\nthe two of you don't have any specific requests?
I don't mind.\nI've already entrusted everything to Yotsuba.
If we decide too hastily and the facilities are closed\nor we need reservations,\nit'll just be a waste of time, right?
Oh, I see. I'll let her know.
Ah...
What's up? Did you remember something you want to do?
No, it's not that. I just thought that if I go along\nwith whatever Yotsuba wants to do,\nI might not be able to keep up with her physically.
I get your point. Now that you mention it,\nRaiha is still a middle school student,\nso intense activities would be dangerous for her.
She's definitely considered that, right?
Well, Miku, if you think it's too much for you,\nI'll stop Yotsuba.
Yeah, you SAY that,\nbut if Miku can't keep up with her,\nthen you won't be able to keep up either, Fu-kun.
That's true.\nYou're also pretty weak, Futaro.
I can't say anything to that...
If you keep going like this,\nyou might disappoint Yotsuba in the future, you know.
Oof...\nI mean, there's a part of me,\nthat thinks that as well.
That's right. When we were swimming in the sea earlier,\nyou were having trouble keeping up\nwith Yotsuba, weren't you?
You saw that?!
Also, you're the type to push themselves\neven though you know you're not as\nphysically capable.
Yotsuba is probably worried about that too.
For sure... I can't say that I'm the same as Yotsuba,\nbut I want to at the very least, I want to train to be\nas strong as the average person.
I mean, you could ask Yotsuba for help with that.
She'd be really eager to train you.
Ahh, well, I have SOME pride, you know?\nI'd like to do it without the other person noticing.
You're just being proud for no reason.
Futaro, I didn't think you cared\nabout appearances THAT much.
Yeah, just give up and ask Yotsuba for help.\nShe'll be happy to help, I'm sure.
Right, let me think about it for a bit.\nThanks, you two.
